case_title: GREGLEN MORRIS VS. PRE-PRESS INTERNATIONAL, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORRIS, GREGLEN AS TO DEFENDANT PRE-PRESS INTERNATIONAL, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORRIS, GREGLEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRE-PRESS INTERNATIONAL, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $975.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
